title: Claude Code (Fable) V/S Codex (GPT-5.5) : MATHEMATICAL TEST = ONE CLEAR WINNER!
summary: The video compares subscription-based AI services (ChatGPT Plus, ChatGPT Pro, Claude Pro, Claude Max) with API pricing models. SemiAnalysis estimates show that lower-tier subscriptions can provide hundreds to thousands of dollars in equivalent API value monthly, making them valuable for heavy users but less critical for occasional users or production workflows.
writeup: The video weighs subscription AI plans (ChatGPT Plus, ChatGPT Pro, Claude Pro, Claude Max) against API pricing models. Citing SemiAnalysis estimates, it argues that even lower-tier subscriptions can deliver hundreds to thousands of dollars in equivalent API value each month. The takeaway: subscriptions favor heavy users, while occasional users and production workflows gain less from them.
